target: 38. Ushio and Mio
(Ushio…)
(For some reason, she looped back with me.)
(Judging from what she said, it's natural to think that...)
Thanks for the food!!
...Mmm~~~~!! So delicious~~~~~~~~.
(She's completely off her guard... C-Could I do it now...?)
(No... wait... Is she trying to see what I'll do?)
(If that's the case, making a careless move is dangerous...)
(I'll let her think she has the upper hand a bit longer...)
...You. Where did you come from, and how did you get here?

Huh?
I walked, of course!
When I woke up, I was at Omoto Beach, y'know?
Before that, I was at the summer festival. I was at the Hiruko shrine... I thought maybe I was dreaming, but...
And, since my house was the only place I could go, I came back, but no one was here...
When I turned on the TV, it said today was the 22nd...

Today was my funeral, wasn't it?
That's why no one was home?
Yeah... that's right...
Ah! It's okay!! No one saw me! I've figured that much out!!
Since I'm... like a monster. I'll make sure no one finds me anymore.
A monster... Th-That's not...
(No, no, look at the big picture! Can you really say that for sure?)
(Nagumo-sensei said it too! Don't let the Shadows sway your heart!)
(First, I need to check... I'll pretend to put my hand on the floor and casually touch her shadow...)
Hyan!!?
Wh... What!!? That was super ticklish just now!? D-Did you do something!?
Huh...? I-I didn't do anything. My hands are right here.
You're right... I felt like I was touched, though. I-It wasn't a ghost, right...?
Probably just your imagination, right?
Jeez, I got goosebumps!!
Haha…
(No doubt about it...! If touching her shadow makes her ticklish, then just like the other Shadows, her weak point is the 2D shadow...!)
(Which means as long as I can stab her shadow, I can definitely kill her...!)
(If I stab her shadow with the knife right now, she'll die...!!)
(Just look at her... she's... completely wide open...!)
(...Damn it, I can't do it...!)
(She was the one who, back then—)
(Right before I looped at the shrine grounds, she punched the four-armed Shadow and saved me...)
(That time two years ago—)
Tokyo!!?
Alain has an acquaintance in Tokyo.
And they agreed to let me board there...
I'll commute to culinary school from there.
What's that…
I'm not taking the exams for the high schools in Wakayama. It's already decided.
You never told me about this.
Whatever. I don't need to tell you.
Why!!? How could you decide something so important on your own!?
Why can't I decide on my own!!!
Listen. I'm not going to just stay as a child of this house... of the Kofune family!!
I'm going to learn to earn my own money as soon as possible!
I don't want to keep being a burden on Alain and you guys forever!!
...A burden?
…Shinpei, do you hate this place?
Huh!!? How did you come to that conclusion!?
Fine!! I have nothing more to say to you!!
I'm the one who's had enough!!
(You're wrong, Ushio... There's no way I could hate it here.)
(...I love you...!)
(I just don't want to be family with you in this way...)
Hey, Shinpei.
Since today is your last day. I'd like Shinpei's curry for dinner.
Huh?
I've got a lot of packing and stuff to do! Let's do it next time.
Shinpei, you idiot...
Hello…
Mio? It's been a while.
Shin-chan, Shin-chan…
What's wrong? Did something happen!?
*Hic*, Sis...
U-Ushio? Did something happen to Ushio?
Sis... she died...
(There was no "next time." That's what I thought...)
(And yet...)
You finally made it for me...
I'm so glad... I got to eat Shinpei's curry again...
I'm so glad I'm alive...
Is it... good?
Seconds!!
Even when Dad makes it, the flavor just isn't the same. Shinpei's is definitely the best!
I see... I'm glad.
(She is "Ushio"... She's Ushio...)
…Hey, Shinpei?
Hm?
If the 24th comes around like this. Will the same thing happen again?
Yeah... I'm planning to stop it somehow.
...I see... Then I'll help, too!!
I don't want the Hitogashima summer festival to be ruined by those monsters...!
And I definitely don't want Mio and everyone else to disappear!!
You're right... Me too...!! Let's stop them together!!!
Yeah…!!
Ah, right...
I saw it...!! Before the real Shinpei arrived, at the shrine grounds...
Toki-chan was... talking to the Shadows...
Toki-chan... Y-You mean that Toki-chan!?
Yeah...!! Sou's younger sister, Tokiko-chan!
Wait! Wait, wait, wait, wait... Tell me what happened in order!
First, at that time, I told you to wait in the woods behind the tents, right?
Yeah... I was hiding there for a while, but...
Suddenly, I heard a weird voice in my head...
I couldn't make it out clearly... But it felt like I was being called...
I started feeling like I had to go to the Hiruko shrine...
...And, when I got to the shrine grounds, Sou was confessing to Mio...
He actually went and did it, that guy...!!
And, sure enough, he got rejected... After that, I came out! And told him "Don't mind it"!!
You've gotta be kidding me...
But I can kind of picture it, that situation...
Well... then Shinpei... No, not Shinpei...
My Shadow, huh...
That Shinpei's body flashed with light... And from his feet, Sou's Shadow...
And then, as if that was a signal, people... turned into black Shadows...
Screams started coming from all over... The Shadows... started attacking everyone...
Shadows were mixed in among the people on the shrine grounds... Do you know who was a Shadow!?
Sorry... It all happened in an instant...
Sou tried to escape while protecting Mio, but the Shadows blocked their escape route...
The two of them were gradually cornered into the middle of the shrine grounds.
I was caught... and all I could do was watch...
...And then. That's when Toki-chan—
This wasn't the promise.
You weren't supposed to lay a hand... on my brother and Mio!
That's what you said!!!!
T... Tokiko?
The Hishigata family has been of great help to us... But that ends today.
(No way... <color=#GF_TIPS_118>Toki-chan</color> is connected to the Shadows!?)
(What does this mean? Damn it...)
After that, I... lost consciousness...
I see…
(And the rest is just as I saw it, huh.)
(Come to think of it, that time... in the middle of the loop...)
A girl in red...
She was floating above the Hiruko shrine... A girl with long white hair, in a red kimono...
Did you see her!?
…Yeah.
That one who seemed like the boss of the Shadows... the four-armed guy, right?
He... called that girl in red "Mother."
Shinpei's Shadow said something weird, too... Asking if you couldn't hear the voice...
...I see!
The Shadows have a "Mother"... an "Okaasan"!
That's the "girl in red"... What if the Shadows are receiving some kind of telepathy... orders from her to act?
The reason you don't act like a Shadow is because you aren't receiving those orders properly...
Like, um... you're "broken" or something...!!
...Can you even copy humans in the first place!?
...L-Let me try...!! Hah!!
…You can't, huh.
The Shadows called you a "traitor." Ring any bells?
No... I can only remember up to the point where I met you at Omoto Beach that night...
I don't clearly remember when I died, and I have no idea what I was doing before that...
Ushio was copied at the Omoto Beach Trash Cleanup on July 18th. You were probably born then.
According to Mio, you made eye contact with Ushio, then immediately ran away and disappeared.
You don't remember that either?
Wait a sec... I remember something...
Th... this memory...? ...I was... doing something with... myself...
...What was it again...?
Don't force it…
You'll remember eventually. If there's some kind of trigger—
(It's from Nagumo-sensei... "Are there any abnormalities?" huh...)
(I was supposed to tell her if even the slightest thing happened differently from before...)
(Should I tell Nagumo-sensei and the others about her existence!?)
(No, of course... I should tell them...)
(…but…)
Shinpei?
…No, nothing.
Anyway, we've been talking for quite a while. What time is it now?
Something's up?
Hm… Yeah, actually…
...Huh? Mio's Shadow is coming...!?
Yeah... It'll appear in front of our house in about 5 minutes...
Did you lock the doors!?
It's fine...
But I don't think locking the doors means much...
Since they can slip through tiny gaps by submerging into the shadows...
What's up with that!! I-I can't do anything like that, though!?
…Well, don't worry!
It has never come inside the house.
Not even once.
Besides, this time I have allies!
Allies!?
Yeah.
(If Mio appears in front of the house, Nezu-san is supposed to snipe her from the opposite shore.)
…Shin-chan?
...It's Mio. Hide!
Hey, you're here, right?
A-Ah, yeah, I'm here! Give me a second!
Hey, hurry up and hide!
Eh!? Even if you say that...
Ah, I know! I'll just hide under the futon for now!
Shin-cha~n, are you ready~?
A-Ah, yeah, it's fine.
Are ya finished eating?
Hm?
I wanna wash the dishes.
Ah… Ah, dishes! Dishes, right!!
Huh! You used two spoons? Two cups, too...
Huh? Is that so strange? No? It's not strange!
N-N-Not strange at all, right?
Why'd ya suddenly drop yer accent?
Sis ain't here, is she?
I mean, Shin-chan, you made this for Sis too, right?
Sis is definitely here. On Hitogashima, the souls of the deceased return home...
And they become the guardian spirit of the house! That's what Karikiri-san said.
Ah, yeah…
(S-So that's what she meant...)
You can just leave the dishes. I'll wash them later...
You should go take a bath first.
Hm... Thanks for the meal, Shin-chan!
That was close... My lifespan just shortened...
Mio can be pretty sharp sometimes...!!
Fufu, definitely—
Gwaaaah!!?
Wh... What!? I-I-Is there something else—
(Wait—)
Ushio!!!!
(S-She got stabbed in my place...!?)
It... hurts...
Gaaaaaaaah!!!!!
Ushio! Are you okay...!?
Aaaaaaaaah!!!!
(This is bad! Ushio will die at this rate!)
Uoooooohhh!! Get away from Ushio!!
Hah... hah... hah...
(This isn't an opponent I can beat in a fight...!)
(I know that... But so what!?)
(If I'm going to die anyway! Rather than doing nothing and getting killed, I have to do something... anything!!)
(The only thing I can do... The best I can do right now is!!)
(I opened the curtains...! Now Nezu-san should notice that Mio has appeared...!)
Come and get me... Mio...!
...Sh-Shinpei...
I'll be your opponent...!!
(What I can do now is... clear the line of fire for Nezu-san!)
(And, trusting Nezu-san, lure Mio near the window...!!)
Sis. Why are you taking his side...?
Shin-chan is allies with Nezu and Minakata, who killed Shadows...
(She knows! That we defeated Shiori!!)
Hah, hah... Wh-Why, you ask...?
What's this... Fakes sure are slow on the uptake!
I love Shinpei...
Got a problem... with me taking the side of the person I love!!!!
Even though you're dead...
Even though Sis is dead... Even though Sis is dead...
Even though you're dead!!!!
Shin—
Huh!?
(Mio staggered!! This is my chance!!!!)
Gah...!
Hah, hah, hah...
...It... hurts...
...Wh-Why?
I also... love Shin-chan—
…Mio.
Guh!
Ah, ah, ah...!
Hah... hah... Hah, hah, hah...
(I did it... I... defeated Mio!?)
Ushio!!?
Hey... Stay with me, Ushio...
Ushio!
(The stab wound she took protecting me is already closing...!!)
(Damage to the body seems to regenerate quickly. But—)
(The bleeding from her arm... The wound from having her shadow cut won't heal...!!)
(What should I do!? Is she going to die!!?)
(If this bleeding continues…!!)
Excuse me~~.
...N-Nagumo-sensei...!
I've come to eliminate that Shadow.
W-Wait, please!!
Why are you getting in my way?
First of all, I'm glad you're safe, Shinpei-san. But what is that?
That's a Shadow, right? Now, move aside so I can kill it.
I... I refuse...
Did that Shadow whisper something into your ear?
I told you, didn't I? If you talk to a Shadow for too long, you'll be led astray.
Nagumo-sensei...!!
I'm well aware that you hold a grudge against the Shadows, and I believe I understand your goal of eliminating all the Shadows on this island!
But!!!! This one...
She protected me twice... She put her body on the line for me... She did...
She doesn't think ahead... Even if she thinks, her hands move first... She's the idiot Ushio...
So please, Nagumo-sensei...
Just like how you treated my arm... Please treat... her injury too...!
...I'll leave the decision to my sister.
Honestly, you... It would be one thing if you were begging me to let it go. But to treat it?
You don't think I'll be swayed just because you're taking a contrarian stance, do you?
If you side with the Shadows, I will have to kill you too.
...I don't mind...
If you do, I'll just loop again, and next time I'll convince you for sure!!
Shinpei... What about Mio...? Is the real Mio... safe...?
That…
...The real one is in the bath. I checked earlier. Mio Kofune is alive.
R-Really!!?
I see... Th-Thank goodness...
It's the same... This voice. The same voice that lured me to the island...
The one who recorded that message for me was Ushio Kofune...!!
...Adapting to the situation, huh. Very well.
Show me the wound.
